name_cn:
Black with Gold Buckle·
SOLFERINO BOX_23cm
A best-seller that conquered the fashion world before it even launched. Inspired by the Rue De Solferino street name in Paris! The bag uses original patent leather calfskin with excellent flexibility and texture! It features a three-layer accordion interior for daily essentials. The newly designed "L" letter buckle opens vertically, completely redefining the concept of a bag clasp. It's simply too interesting!
Model: 634305
Size: 23x16x6cm
